summary.key_theme: Apple 透過擴大美國本土製造與開放 Siri 整合 AI 生態系，展現供應鏈韌性與軟體服務轉型的積極策略。

bullish.title: Apple adds Bosch, Cirrus Logic, others to US manufacturing program, to invest $400 million
bullish.reason: Apple 承諾投入 4 億美元擴大美國製造，並新增 Bosch、Cirrus Logic 等合作夥伴，有助於降低地緣政治風險並強化供應鏈韌性。

bullish.title: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services, Bloomberg News reports
bullish.reason: Apple 計劃在 iOS 27 更新中開放 Siri 整合外部 AI 服務，此舉顯示公司在 AI 競爭中採取更開放的生態系策略，有利於提升用戶體驗與服務營收。

bullish.title: Apple iPhone loyalty strengthens, supporting services growth outlook
bullish.reason: iPhone 用戶忠誠度持續增強，為 Apple 高毛利的服務業務提供了穩定的成長基礎。

bullish.title: Apple's Expanding Enterprise Footprint to Boost Sales: What's Ahead?
bullish.reason: 企業端部署規模擴大，有助於提升 Apple 裝置的安裝基數，進而帶動長期銷售動能。

bullish.title: Apple Taps TSMC Washington Plant As Valuation Debate Persists
bullish.reason: 與台積電美國廠合作生產感測器晶片，進一步落實關鍵零組件在地化生產。

bearish.title: I'm 'uber-skeptical' about Apple's major AI upgrade, says Freedom Capital's Paul Meeks
bearish.reason: 分析師對 Apple 的 AI 升級持高度懷疑態度，認為其技術轉型可能面臨執行風險。

bearish.title: Apple Stock Has Been Weak This Year. Why Analysts Think Better Times Are Ahead.
bearish.reason: 股價今年表現疲軟且經歷連續四週下跌，反映市場對短期成長動能的擔憂。

neutral.title: Final Trades: Netflix, Ardagh Metal Packaging, Citigroup and Apple
neutral.reason: 僅為投資委員會提及的觀察名單，未提供具體買賣建議。

neutral.title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
neutral.reason: 參與中國發展論壇屬於常規企業外交活動，旨在維持市場關係，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Who is the target consumer for Apple's MacBook Neo, and will they buy?
neutral.reason: 針對新產品市場定位的討論，屬於市場分析性質，無實質財務影響。

neutral.title: Warren Buffett and Greg Abel Spent $78 Billion Buying This Stock Since 2018
neutral.reason: 文章重點在於波克夏海瑟威的投資組合配置，Apple 僅作為比較基準提及。
